The dispute in Hardam Singh vs State Of Punjab was about the conviction and sentencing of four individuals, along with several co-accused, for various offenses including murder and possession of unlicensed firearms. The Punjab-Haryana High Court, in a judgment dated September 12, 2019, allowed the appeals of the accused, setting aside their convictions and sentences.
